title: Outreach Failure Analysis — Why 20 Sent, 0 Replies

likely_failure_reasons: Emails too long and detailed — prospects may not read past first paragraph
Widget embed pitch is technical and unfamiliar — readers don't know what an 'embeddable calculator' is
Cold outreach from unknown brand (QFINHUB) — no trust established
Subject lines may not convey immediate value
No social proof or examples of other sites using the widget

target_analysis.large_finance_sites: MoneyUnder30, Investopedia, BiggerPockets — likely get many pitches, harder to break through
target_analysis.recommendation: Shift to smaller, niche blogs where QFINHUB calculators are genuinely useful
